en.extract:
Hume's boobook or Hume's hawk-owl (Ninox obscura) is a species of owl in the family Strigidae endemic to the Andaman Islands. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests and subtropical or tropical mangrove forests. It is becoming rare due to habitat loss.

'''Hume's boobook''' or '''Hume's hawk-owl''' ('''''Ninox obscura''''') is a species of [[owl]] in the family [[Strigidae]] [[endemic]] to the [[Andaman Islands]]. Its natural [[habitat]]s are subtropical or tropical moist lowland [[forest]]s and subtropical or tropical mangrove forests. It is becoming rare due to [[habitat loss]].
